name: AI Content Pipeline - YouTube/Shorts
description: Weekly AI-assisted content pipeline. Runs every Monday to research trends and create script drafts using OpenAI. Requires HUMAN APPROVAL at two stages: script review and pre-publish.

nodes.name: Weekly Content Trigger (Mon 08:00)
nodes.notes: Runs every Monday at 08:00 to kick off the weekly content research cycle.

nodes.name: Define Weekly Research Topics
nodes.notes: Define your content niches and keywords here. Customize for your business.

values.content: คุณเป็น Content Strategist ผู้เชี่ยวชาญ YouTube Shorts และ TikTok สำหรับตลาดไทย เชี่ยวชาญด้านธุรกิจ logistics, อสังหาฯ, และ wellness. สร้าง content ideas ที่ดึงดูด มี hook ที่แข็งแกร่ง และ value ที่ชัดเจน

nodes.name: GPT-4 Content Research
nodes.notes: Uses GPT-4o to research and generate content ideas. Configure OpenAI credentials.

nodes.name: Notify Team - Script Review Needed
nodes.notes: HUMAN APPROVAL GATE 1 — Team must review and approve script before production starts.

nodes.name: Notify - Final Publish Approval
nodes.notes: HUMAN APPROVAL GATE 2 — Final review before publishing. No auto-publishing.

setupInstructions: 1. Replace YOUR_CONTENT_SHEET_ID with your Content Calendar Google Sheets ID
2. Replace YOUR_LINE_NOTIFY_TOKEN with your LINE Notify token
5. Customize topic niches and keywords in 'Define Weekly Research Topics' node
